title: You Planted Them Correctly
caption: Rosie had texted Mr. Chen from Chloe's phone. She had not mentioned this. He walked through the gap in the fence with great dignity, and the silence that followed was enormous. Then he knelt beside the seedlings and said: 'You planted them correctly.' It was not what anyone expected him to say.
story_notes: Mr. Chen arrives. After a long tense silence, he kneels beside Dev's seedlings and says 'You planted them correctly.' The first unexpected act of grace.
